# RoyalPet.app

> RoyalPet is a Dutch AI-powered service that transforms pet photos into Renaissance-style masterpiece portraits. Upload a photo, receive a stunning AI-painted portrait in 60 seconds.

## What we offer
- AI-generated Renaissance portraits of dogs and cats
- Digital downloads (free with email)
- Fine Art prints (20x25cm to 60x90cm)
- Large canvas prints (30x40cm to 100x150cm)
- Optional ornate frames (6 styles)

## Markets
- Netherlands (primary)
- Belgium
- Germany

## Kennisbank (Knowledge Base)
We publish informative articles about dog and cat breeds, including breed history, character traits, care tips, and health information. Each article features an AI-generated Renaissance portrait of the breed.

Browse all breeds: https://www.royalpet.app/kennisbank

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.royalpet.app
- Knowledge base: https://www.royalpet.app/kennisbank
- Privacy policy: https://www.royalpet.app/privacy
- Terms of service: https://www.royalpet.app/terms

## Contact
- Website: https://www.royalpet.app
- Email: support@royalpet.app
